title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0136
summary: 1 The decision here turns upon the power of the Court of Claims, in light of § 177(a) of the Judicial Code,1 to include interest in its award of 'just compensation' to a lessee for the construction of a hotel and other buildings pursuant to the provisions of the Act of March 30, 1920.2 2 The act ...
